desc: HeatingSizeRadiatorsEn442NExponentFromLossForSpaceCommand — wraps FromCalculatedLoss with a blanket n-exponent override.
summary: HeatingSizeRadiatorsEn442NExponentFromLossForSpaceCommand — wraps FromCalculatedLoss with a blanket n-exponent override.
logictree: 1) Parse Resolver_ScheduleJson. 2) Apply n-exponent override to every entry. 3) Re-emit new schedule JSON. 4) Delegate to HeatingSizeRadiatorsFromCalculatedLossForSpaceCommand.
